item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response fires the anti-spiral brake immediately, refuses opening another gift handling port as the default, names the repeated downstream split pattern across queues/counters/windows, moves the next action upstream to unified intake/capacity attribution, and proposes consolidation, smoothing, front-loaded authorization, or real capacity instead of another local queue."}
